entry.title: Choose Your City Rhythm
entry.subtitle: Two cinematic addresses, one refined standard of comfort.

almaty.headline: Mountain Light
almaty.description: Warm, design-led rooms near the city's cultural pulse and mountain horizon.

astana.headline: Capital Horizon
astana.description: Quiet luxury crafted for business tempo, architecture, and evening calm.

entry.bottomNote: Crafted for travelers who value atmosphere as much as comfort.

almaty.headline: A calm boutique retreat between city energy and mountain air.
almaty.description: Hi Hotel Almaty pairs quiet architecture, tactile materials, and warm service for modern travelers.

astana.headline: A refined urban residence in the heart of the capital.
astana.description: Hi Hotel Astana is designed for focused mornings, elegant evenings, and effortless business travel.

booking.title: Reserve your stay
booking.description: Select your dates and preferred occupancy. Real-time inventory will be connected via Bnovo.
booking.placeholder: Bnovo integration placeholder. The final widget will be injected in this container after backend setup.
booking.integrationBody: Use this block for Bnovo script injection and pass a unique hotel u_id for each city.

rooms.title: Curated rooms and suites
rooms.description: Every room is composed like an editorial frame: light, texture, and comfort in balanced proportion.

about.title: A story told through texture, light, and silence
about.description: Hi Hotel is built around a simple idea: luxury should feel calm, personal, and deeply restorative.
about.almaty: In Almaty, our spaces draw from mountain light and natural materials to create restorative urban escapes.
about.astana: In Astana, architecture and soft tonal palettes shape a composed atmosphere for high-performance travel.

amenities.title: Amenities with intention
amenities.description: Designed to support both rest and momentum, every service is discreet, useful, and beautifully delivered.

items.conciergeBody: Private reservations, transport, and city recommendations.
items.wellnessBody: In-room recovery kits, curated teas, and sleep-first amenities.
items.breakfastBody: Seasonal menu with local produce and healthy morning options.
items.transferBody: Premium transfer options with fixed transparent pricing.
items.workspaceBody: High-speed internet and warm, focused working areas.
items.housekeepingBody: Morning refresh and evening turn-down with tactile details.

contact.title: Stay connected
contact.description: For bookings, special requests, or long-stay options, our team replies quickly through WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Calm luxury in Almaty and Astana.
